rows.stdout_tail:
Usage: cli.py post-closure-observability-harvest [OPTIONS]                     
                                                                                
 Emit bounded post-closure observability receipts without reopening the closed  
 queue.                                                                         
                                                                                
╭─ Options ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ *  --radius              -r      INTEGER RANGE [x>=1]  Bounded number of     │
│                                                        observation receipts  │
│                                                        to emit.              │
│                                                        [required]            │
│    --source-closure-re…          TEXT                  Accepted closure      │
│                                                        review receipt id.    │
│                                                        [default: 52d0ea8d]   │
│    --label                       TEXT                  Optional run label.   │
│    --help                                              Show this message and │
│                                                        exit.                 │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯

previous run.                    │
│ agent-select                                Select the next command from a   │
│                                             fixed allowlist based on an      │
│                                             explicit agent-eval JSON report. │
│ agent-plan-check                            Validate a content-addressed     │
│                                             agent-select receipt before any  │
│                                             execution layer exists.          │
│ agent-exec-dry-run                          Emit a dry-run executor receipt  │
│                                             from a PASS agent-plan-check     │
│                                             receipt. Does not execute        │
│                                             subprocesses.                    │
│ agent-post-check                            Verify that a manual execution   │
│                                             result matches a prior PASS      │
│                                             executor dry-run receipt.        │
│ agent-loop-summary                          Emit a compact receipt card for  │
│                                             one complete operator-mediated   │
│                                             agent loop.                      │
│ agent-confirm-loop                          Record explicit operator         │
│                                             confirmation for a completed     │
│                                             PASS loop summary.               │
│ agent-next-from-confirmation                Consume a PASS continue          │
│                                             confirmation and emit the next   │
│                                             fixed selector receipt from its  │
│                                             allowed eval source.             │
│ agent-cycle-ledger                          Build a machine-readable cycle   │
│                                             ledger from explicit loop        │
│                                             summary receipts.                │
│ agent-cycle-next                            Select the next controlled       │
│                                             experiment from a cycle ledger.  │
│ agent-cycle-observe                         Validate and record the observed │
│                                             result of a cycle-next           │
│                                             execution.                       │
│ agent-cycle-append-observation              Append a clean cycle observation │
│                                             to an existing cycle ledger.     │
│ agent-cheat-check                           Read-only cheating detector for  │
│                                             baseline stability claims.       │
│ agent-cheat-adversarial                     Adversarial cheating detector    │
│                                             using real temp DB mutations     │
│                                             only.                            │
│ cell-transfer-contract                      Create a                         │
│                                             measurement-discipline-only      │
│                                             transfer contract between cells. │
│ domain-shift-generator                      Create a Cell 1 domain-shift     │
│                                             generator manifest without       │
│                                             running it.                      │
│ domain-shift-runner-support                 Validate executable runner       │
│                                             support for a domain-shift       │
│                                             generator manifest.              │
│ domain-shift-slot-runner-support            Create slot-separated runner     │
│                                             support for repeated-family      │
│                                             domain shifts.                   │
│ radius-expansion-candidate-decision         Build exact-radius candidate     │
│                                             decision under burden policy.    │
│ radius-expansion-candidate-decision-verify  Reload and verify an             │
│                                             exact-radius candidate decision. │
│ radius-expansion-burden-policy              Build radius expansion burden    │
│                                             policy after the verified R100   │
│                                             decision.                        │
│ radius-expansion-burden-policy-verify       Reload and verify a radius       │
│                                             expansion burden policy.         │
│ r100-scale-decision-with-rollup             Decide R100 scale outcome using  │
│                                             the verified burden rollup.      │
│ r100-scale-decision-with-rollup-verify      Reload and verify an R100 scale  │
│                                             decision with verified rollup.   │
│ verified-r100-burden-rollup                 Build verified R100 burden       │
│                                             rollups from raw manifests.      │
│ verified-r100-burden-rollup-verify          Reload and verify a verified     │
│                                             R100 burden rollup bundle.       │
│ receipt-rollup-contract                     Build the post-R100 receipt      │
│                                             rollup contract.                 │
│ receipt-rollup-contract-verify              Reload and verify a receipt      │
│                                             rollup contract.                 │
│ r100-radius-scale-observation               Build the R50/R75/R100 scale     │
│                                             observation with explicit burden │
│                                             evaluation.                      │
│ r100-radius-scale-observation-verify        Reload and verify an R100 radius │
│                                             scale observation.               │
│ r75-scale-decision                          Decide the R75 scale outcome and │
│                                             whether the next radius is       │
│                                             licensed.                        │
│ r75-scale-decision-verify                   Reload and verify an R75 scale   │
│                                             decision receipt from disk.      │
│ radius-scale-observation                    Compare R75 slot observation     │
│                                             against the R50 baseline under   │
│                                             the scalability contract.        │
│ radius-scale-observation-verify             Reload and verify a radius scale │
│                                             observation from disk.           │
│ scalability-contract                        Build the post-R50/pre-R75       │
│                                             first-order scalability          │
│                                             contract.                        │
│ scalability-contract-verify                 Reload and verify a scalability  │
│                                             contract from disk.              │
│ domain-shift-slot-observe                   Observe a slot-separated         │
│                                             domain-shift execution and       │
│                                             classify transfer outcome.       │
│ post-closure-observability-harvest          Emit bounded post-closure        │
│                                             observability receipts without   │
│                                             reopening the closed queue.      │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
